---
title: "Alice, Grand Duchess of Hesse, Princess of Great Britain and Ireland: Biographical Sketch and Letters"
---

## Alice, Grand Duchess of Hesse, Princess of Great Britain and Ireland: Biographical Sketch and Letters

**Author:** Alice Maud Mary, Princess of Great Britain
**Date:** 1884
**Imprint:** London: Murray

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
